rationale: The citing paper explicitly uses estimated elasticities to simulate and recommend impression reallocation across funnel stages, which is a budgeting/allocation task. The cited paper is a JMR article on dynamic marketing budgeting with an optimization decision aid, making it a plausible methodological or conceptual source rather than an obvious incidental mention; with only a DOI match and no in-text snippet, it still merits second-stage checking.
